figures.caption: Figure 2: Visual results on the Text images: (a,c) blurred images; (b,d) restored latent images and their corresponding estimated kernels.
Figure 5: Visual results on the boat and face images: (a,d) blurred images; (b,e) intermediate restored latent images and their corresponding estimated kernels; (c,f) final restored latent images.

Figure 1: Visual results on the Levien dataset: (a,e,i,m) clear images 1-4, respectively; (b,f,j,n) blurred images and their corresponding kernels; (c,g,k,o) intermediate restored latent images and their corresponding estimated kernels; (d,h,l,p) final restored latent images.

Figure 4: Visual results on the Köhler Dataset: (a) blurred image (image 2, kernel 1); restored latent images and their corresponding estimated kernels by (b) method in [34]; (c) method in [8], (d) method in [35], (e) proposed method.

Figure 3: Visual results on the Köhler Dataset: (a) blurred image (image 1, kernel 5); restored latent images and their corresponding estimated kernels by (b) method in [34]; (c) method in [8], (d) method in [35], (e) proposed method.
Table 2: Quantitative comparison of image deblurring results (best values in bold).
